description: Built-in agent templates (data, not code). Each template dir has template.toml (name/description/hooks.pre_stop), start.sh (bash launcher), .env.example (placeholder env template), soul.md (persona/instructions), optional skills/*/SKILL.md. Loaded by runner.py/template_loader.py

key_classes_functions.name: [template] name / description / [hooks] pre_stop
key_classes_functions.purpose: Minimal template metadata — example: name='claude', pre_stop='/exit'

key_classes_functions.name: claude start.sh
key_classes_functions.purpose: Copy channel-server plugin into workspace, write .claude/settings.local.json with SessionStart ready hook + permissions, build .mcp.json, exec 'claude --permission-mode bypassPermissions --dangerously-load-development-channels server:zchat-agent-mcp'

key_classes_functions.name: claude SessionStart ready hook
key_classes_functions.purpose: touch ${ZCHAT_PROJECT_DIR}/agents/${AGENT_NAME}.ready — AgentManager polls this file for readiness

key_classes_functions.name: 5 built-in templates
key_classes_functions.purpose: claude (base), fast-agent, deep-agent, admin-agent, squad-agent — differ in soul.md persona + skills/ instructions; same start.sh pattern

public_interface: Each template exposes env vars AGENT_NAME, IRC_SERVER, IRC_PORT, IRC_CHANNELS, IRC_TLS, IRC_PASSWORD, WORKSPACE, ZCHAT_PROJECT_DIR, IRC_AUTH_TOKEN, CHANNEL_PKG_DIR, MCP_SERVER_CMD
